attributes.action: Ensure that Her Majesty The Queen, THE Queen, Elizabeth II, is back '-STILL' !
attributes.additional_details: The Queen, Elizabeth (II) is poignantly required back - STILL - by many of The People, especially Older People, Ladies, Sensitive people, and people who "don't cope well with change" (some of us, to quote the 'Wonder Woman' -film, simply call it 'Love'). It has been deeply alarming that more explanation was not given to The Public as to why that Lady, much famed for celebrating Centenarianism, left us so before- age-100, and that is suspicious in addition to distressing two ways. We miss Eliz'.
attributes.background: Ensure, from before the year 2020, that there is the best potential for The Queen - Elizabeth (II) - still-to-be-publicly-Queen : of course very well alive for such ; this not least so a lot of problems of the last several years can be avoided. This using Ethical- Timetravel- resolution to effect.
